seoTitle: Cape Conran vs Cape Otway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Conran and Cape Otway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Conran vs Cape Otway: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Conran and Cape Otway.
heading: Cape Conran vs Cape Otway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Conran, Victoria and Cape Otway, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Conran and Cape Otway have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Cape Conran or Cape Otway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Conran has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cape Otway scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Conran scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Otway scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Conran or Cape Otway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Conran has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
